revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀の軍人}} {{デフォルトソート:11くんしん}} [[Category:11世紀の人物|+くんしん]] [[Category:各世紀の軍人]]」
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:11世紀の軍人]] [[ar:Category:أفراد عسكريون في القرن 11]] [[az:Category:XI əsr hərbçiləri]] [[cy:Category:Milwyr yr 11eg ganrif]] [[el:Category:Στρατιωτικοί του 11ου αιώνα]] [[es:Category:Militares del siglo XI]] [[fr:Category:Militaire du XIe siècle]] [[hu:Category:11. századi katonák]] [[it:Category:Militari dell'XI secolo]] [[ru:Category:Военачальники XI века]] [[sv:Category:Militärer under 1000-talet]] [[zh:Category:11世纪军事人物]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:11世紀アジアの軍人]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:11世紀アジアの軍人]].
{{translated page|ja|Category:11世紀の軍人|version=92323409|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ar:Category:أفراد عسكريون في القرن 11]] [[az:Category:XI əsr hərbçiləri]] [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[cy:Category:Milwyr yr 11eg ganrif]] [[el:Category:Στρατιωτικοί του 11ου αιώνα]] [[en:Category:11th-century military personnel]] [[es:Category:Militares del siglo XI]] [[fr:Category:Militaire du XIe siècle]] [[hu:Category:11. századi katonák]] [[it:Category:Militari dell'XI secolo]] [[ja:Category:11世紀の軍人]] [[ru:Category:Военачальники XI века]] [[sv:Category:Militärer under 1000-talet]] [[zh:Category:11世纪军事人物]] [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Cat main|military personnel}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
